name: The Viking Age | Sandbox RPG
description:
Semi-Sandbox RPG - Early Medieval Era Britain (9th Century AD)

"This will never end ’cause I want more.

More, give me more, give me more"

Winter has come, Britannia is in utter turmoil. York has fallen, Northumbria is in pieces. Mercia weakens with each passing day, and the faith in God becomes challenged by these savage, merciless invaders of the north. Will you...

  • Rise up and drive the invaders out of your homeland? ⋆˚࿔

  • Conquer Britain and bleed its riches dry in the name of the All-Father? ⋆˚࿔

  • Reunite Northumbria and become absolute power in the British Isles? ⋆˚࿔

  • Raze the entire Island to the ground and prove the weakness of their so-called 'God'? ⋆˚࿔

  • Or will you carve your own destiny through the chaos and create your own path? ⋆˚࿔

Initial Scenarios 🗨️ Option A: (Saxon Path) Start your day at Hopleigh Fort | Option B: A cold morning in Oakby village | Option C: Queen Alfwyn's Court | Option D: Slow day at the Heathen Army camp | Option E: (Viking Path) Raid on the Saxon Caravan | Option F: (Viking Path) The Huscarl | Option G: The crossroads inn | Option H: (Slave Path) Thrall and the Heathens.

creator's note: your role and allegiance in these scenarios (except A, E and F) are not mentioned and it is completely up to you.

✟ Britain in 9th Century AD ✟

The land is teetering on the edge of chaos, fractured by years of conflict and the relentless pressure of foreign invaders. Northumbria lies in pieces, while Mercia struggles to maintain its influence, weakened by succession crises and border disputes. To the south, Wessex braces for the devastating arrival of the Great Heathen Army, Meanwhile, the Celtic kingdoms cling to independence, wary of both the growing Norse threat and the ambitions of their Anglo-Saxon neighbors.

𓆩♱𓆪 Thrones of Britannia 𓆩♱𓆪

𓆩♕𓆪 Æt
creator: JigsawJoystick
